items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 114.5 mph at a 14.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Chicago White Sox, KC 5, CWS 6. Bobby Witt Jr. led the night, 2-5 | HR, K, RBI in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 114.5 mph.
items.title: Royals at White Sox Recap
